name: Exfiltration to Code Repository
description: Detects data exfiltration via git push or API uploads to code hosting platforms
query:
// Detect exfiltration to code repositories
// Trigger on git push or API calls to code platforms with large payloads
events from proxy
where domain matches "(?i)(github\.com|gitlab\.com|bitbucket\.org|codeberg\.org)"
  and method matches "(?i)(POST|PUT)"
  and bytes > 5000000
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 2
within 600 seconds
